title: Kanecta Type Definition
description: Schema for a Kanecta custom type definition (type.json). Stored at .kanecta/types/{shard1}/{shard2}/{type-uuid}/type.json

icon.description: MUI icon component name (e.g. 'Person', 'TaskAlt', 'Place'). Used for display in the studio UI.

description.description: One-sentence summary of the type. Shown in type lists and pickers.

details.description: Longer description: when to use this type and how it relates to other types.

keywords.description: Space-separated keywords for search and filtering (e.g. 'human individual biography').

primaryField.description: Dot-separated path to the field in jsonSchema.properties that best represents the item (e.g. 'title', 'name', 'address.street'). Used by UIs to surface the most meaningful value.

claude.description: Guidance for Claude on when and how to use this type.

jsonSchema.description: JSON Schema Draft-07 definition for items of this type.

$id.description: Canonical URI for this type schema (e.g. 'https://kanecta.org/types/person').

properties.description: Field definitions for items of this type.

meta.description: A human individual as a biographical fact.
meta.details: Use for any individual human being. Relates to Organisation via membership.

ai-instructions.claude: Use this type for any individual human being.
